sentences.arabic: فِي الْمَكْتَبَةِ الْقَدِيمَةِ كُتُبٌ كَثِيرَةٌ عَنِ الْأَدَبِ الْعَرَبِيِّ.
sentences.translation: U staroj biblioteci ima mnogo knjiga o arapskoj književnosti.
sentences.translationEn: In the old library, there are many books about Arabic literature.

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ الْكُتُبُ تَحْتَوِي عَلَى رَسَائِلَ نَثْرِيَّةٍ بَلِيغَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Ove knjige sadrže rječita prozna pisma.
sentences.translationEn: These books contain eloquent prose letters.

sentences.arabic: يَقْرَأُ الطُّلَّابُ عَنْ عُلَمَاءِ اللُّغَةِ الَّذِينَ حَفِظُوا التُّرَاثَ.
sentences.translation: Studenti čitaju o lingvistima koji su sačuvali naslijeđe.
sentences.translationEn: Students read about the linguists who preserved the heritage.

sentences.arabic: الْأَدَبُ الْفَصِيحُ هُوَ أَسَاسُ الثَّقَافَةِ الْعَرَبِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Književnost na čistom arapskom jeziku je temelj arapske kulture.
sentences.translationEn: Eloquent literature is the foundation of Arabic culture.

sentences.arabic: نَحْنُ نَفْتَخِرُ بِهَذَا التَّارِيخِ الْأَدَبِيِّ الْعَظِيمِ.
sentences.translation: Ponosni smo na ovu veliku književnu historiju.
sentences.translationEn: We are proud of this great literary history.
